services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Professional solutions to keep your furniture spotless

sofaCleaning.title: Sofa Cleaning
sofaCleaning.description: Recover the look and comfort of your sofas with our professional cleaning. We remove stains, dirt and bad odours, returning freshness to your furniture.

carpetCleaning.title: Carpet Cleaning
carpetCleaning.description: Professional carpet washing service with collection and delivery in Sabadell, Terrassa, Castellar del Vallès, Sant Cugat, Sant Quirze, Barcelona and surrounding areas.

mattressCleaning.title: Mattress Cleaning
mattressCleaning.description: We carry out mattress cleaning services to eliminate dust mites, bacteria and allergens. We guarantee a healthy and restorative rest in your own home.

impermeabilization.title: Waterproofing
impermeabilization.description: Protect your furniture with professional sofa waterproofing and a 2-year written guarantee. Protection against stains, spills and daily wear.

armchairCleaning.title: Armchair Cleaning
armchairCleaning.description: We carry out complete cleaning of your armchairs, removing dirt, stains and odours to restore the appearance and comfort of your furniture.

homeService.title: Home Service
homeService.description: We offer a convenient sofa cleaning service directly in your home, using professional equipment and products to guarantee an effective and high-quality service.

carpetRestoration.title: Carpet Restoration
carpetRestoration.description: Professional restoration of oriental and Persian carpets. Edge repair, colour recovery, hole weaving and specialised washing.

testimonials.title: Our Reviews
testimonials.subtitle: More than 5,000 satisfied customers in Barcelona

1.text: Very professional and a very good service. The sofa is impeccable.
1.author: Laura RS

2.text: I was starting to see the sofa very dirty and discoloured. I called them, they gave me all the information I needed and left the sofa like new. They are fast, clean and very professional. When I need it again I will contact them.
2.author: Montse Antón

3.text: It has been fantastic to meet them. Very kind, they explained everything and gave us all the necessary support for our new sofas. We will stay in touch. Highly highly recommended!
3.author: Laura Bayes

1.q: How long does the service take?
1.a: A 3-seater sofa takes approximately 2-3 hours to clean completely. Waterproofing requires an additional 4-6 hours for drying.

2.q: Are the products safe for children and pets?
2.a: Yes, we use 100% ecological and biodegradable products, safe for the whole family including babies and pets.

3.q: How long does the waterproofing guarantee last?
3.a: We offer a 2-year written guarantee on our waterproofing service.

4.a: Yes, we offer service from Monday to Saturday, including holidays for your convenience.

5.q: Do I need to move the furniture?
5.a: No, our team takes care of everything. We work directly in your home without you having to worry about anything.
